basic_details.job_title: NCDC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II and Field Worker Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II and Field Worker
basic_details.short_information: National Centre for Disease Control (NCDC) has published the Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II and Field Worker Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 vacancies for these posts. Candidates aged up to 30 years for Field Worker and up to 40 years for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II, with the prescribed qualifications of 12th pass or B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology, are eligible to attend the Walk-in Interview on 14-07-2026 and 21-07-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for Fieldworker, Max 40 years for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II.
age_limit.details: Field Worker: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II: Maximum age limit is 40 years.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th pass for Fieldworker, B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II.
qualification.details: Field Worker: 12th pass Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) from Recognized University. Desirable: 1. Work experience in Virology Laboratory, 2. Work experience in accredited laboratory, 3. Knowledge of computer applications

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 24,484/- per month (consolidated) for Fieldworker, Rs. 26,671/- per month (consolidated) for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II
salary_details.details: Field Worker: Rs. 24,484/- per month (consolidated) Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II: Rs. 26,671/- per month (consolidated)

selection_process: Screening of documents Written MCQ Test

content_sections.heading: NCDC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NCDC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NCDC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCDC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Field Worker: 12th pass Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) from Recognized University. Desirable: 1. Work experience in Virology Laboratory, 2. Work experience in accredited laboratory, 3. Knowledge of computer applications

content_sections.heading: NCDC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Field Worker: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II: Maximum age limit is 40 years.

content_sections.heading: NCDC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Field Worker: Rs. 24,484/- per month (consolidated) Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II: Rs. 26,671/- per month (consolidated)

rows.event: Walk-in Written Test for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II
Walk-in Written Test for Field Worker

content_sections.heading: NCDC Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of documents Written MCQ Test

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NCDC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted through a walk-in process. Candidates need to attend the walk-in written test on the specified dates: 14th July 2026 for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II and 21st July 2026 for Field Worker.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NCDC?
faq.answer: NCDC has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II and Field Worker.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Field Worker position, candidates must have passed the 12th standard examination from a recognized board.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II is a B.Sc degree in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Field Worker position?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary for the Field Worker post is Rs. 24,484/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II position?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary for the Junior Laboratory Technician Grade II post is Rs. 26,671/-.

faq.question: Q8. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening of documents followed by a Written MCQ Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Delhi. The specific venue address is 110054.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.
